title: TooltipTexture
description: Makes tooltips use a background texture
body:
# TooltipTexture

### Archival Notice

> This mod is now obsolete as the functionality is included in the game since Snapshot 24w36a and will therefore not receive any updates.

This mod makes it possible to modify the tooltip background using resource packs (means it replaces the default background with a texture). Use it if you want to do this or have a resourcepack wanting to replace the tooltip background.

## For resourcepack makers:

The background texture used is located at `assets/tooltiptexture/background.png`.

## Credits
Icon shows an icon from https://github.com/EliverLara/candy-icons, licensed under GPL-3.0
